siteTitle: Ozly - Unlimited Invoices & Tax Under Control

hero.title: No more mess. Shifts, Invoices & Tax in one place.
hero.titleHighlight: Built for ABN & TFN workers in Australia.
hero.subtitle: Whether you're ABN or TFN — schedule jobs, generate invoices, track expenses with AI, see your net salary after PAYG, know penalty rates for weekends & holidays, and manage everything from one app. Starting from just {price}.

audience.title: Built by immigrants for the daily grind:

features.title: Everything ABN & TFN workers need,
features.subtitle: Stop juggling 4 different apps. Ozly handles shifts, invoices, tax, expenses, penalty rates and salary forecasting in one place.
features.shiftsDesc: Create jobs with flexible duration (1h to full day), bulk edit recurring shifts, and generate PDF invoices instantly. TFN workers get automatic skip-invoice mode.
features.ocrDesc: Snap a receipt — AI reads every item, calculates your deduction and populates the form. Or use Quick Mode for a one-tap expense entry.
features.trackerDesc: See your gross, PAYG withholding and net take-home in real time. Automatic penalty rate calculations for Saturdays (150%), Sundays (200%) and public holidays (250%) under the Cleaning Award.
features.forecastDesc: Compare your ABN income vs equivalent TFN salary side by side. Know your tax, super and Medicare levy. Enter salary as hourly, annual, monthly or fortnightly.

comparison.title: Ozly vs
comparison.subtitle: Other apps limit PDFs, charge a % of your profit and are too complicated for someone hustling on the road. Ozly is offline and unlimited.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: No surprises, no per-invoice fee, no percentage of your earnings. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

homeFaq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
homeFaq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions about Ozly.
homeFaq.stillQuestionsDesc: Get in touch or explore our complete guide with step-by-step instructions for every feature.

guide.title: Complete User Guide & FAQ
guide.subtitle: Everything you need to know to use Ozly and organise your jobs, invoices and finances in Australia.
guide.contactSubtitle: Send us an email and we'll get back to you quickly.

bottomCta.title: While you're reading this, someone is sending an Invoice through Ozly.
bottomCta.subtitle: And getting paid faster than you. Download the app and start now.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.summary: Ozly is a workforce-management and expense-tracking application designed for Australian contractors and small businesses. We collect only the data necessary to deliver our services. Your financial data is encrypted on your device, and you may request complete deletion of your account and all associated data at any time.
privacy.s8: 8. Your Rights Under Australian Privacy Law

terms.title: Terms of Use (EULA)
terms.importantText: By downloading, installing, or using the Ozly application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the App.

faq.pageSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about Ozly. Can't find what you need? Get in touch.
faq.contactSubtitle: Send us an email and we'll get back to you quickly.
faq.a1: Ozly is an app built for ABN and TFN workers in Australia — Cleaners, Tradies, Delivery riders, Employees and any Sole Trader. It combines shifts, unlimited invoices, expense tracking with AI OCR, net salary forecast, penalty rates, payment tracker and financial forecast all in one place.
faq.q2: How does the Payment Tracker work?
faq.a2: The Tracker shows all your invoices organised by status: paid, pending and overdue. You instantly know who owes you and never lose track of money again.
faq.a3: Ozly has 3 plans: TFN ($9/month) for employees, ABN ($15/month) for ABN holders, and MAX ($19/month) for both. All plans include a 14-day free trial. No invoice limits, no percentage of your earnings.
faq.a4: Yes! Ozly works 100% offline. You can create invoices, log expenses and track your jobs without wifi. Everything syncs automatically when you're back online.
faq.a5: Just take a photo of your receipt. Ozly's AI automatically extracts the amount, date and description. Confirm it and the expense is logged for tax deduction.
faq.q6: Does the app calculate my tax?
faq.a6: Yes. Ozly estimates how much tax you'll owe following ATO (Australian Taxation Office) rules. No surprises at tax return time.
faq.q7: Can I send invoices via WhatsApp?
faq.a7: Yes! After generating the PDF invoice, you can share it directly via WhatsApp, email or any other app on your phone.
faq.q8: Is Ozly available in other languages?
faq.a8: Yes! Ozly is available in Portuguese, English and Spanish, both in the app and on the website.
faq.q9: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a9: You can cancel anytime directly through the App Store or Google Play. No hassle, no cancellation fee.
faq.a10: The Financial Forecast shows how much clean cash you'll have in your pocket at the end of the month, after expenses and taxes. No surprises at Tax Return time.
faq.a11: Visa Shield monitors your work hours per fortnight (rolling 14 days) to help you stay under the 48-hour limit for work and student visas. It sums hours across ALL your ABNs automatically.
faq.a12: The Hustle Score is a gamification system that rewards you with XP for completing jobs, creating invoices, logging expenses and maintaining streaks. You progress through 4 tiers: Starter, Hustler, Pro and Legend.
faq.a13: Yes. Your local database is encrypted with SQLCipher (AES-256), tokens are stored in the iOS Keychain / Android Keystore, and all server data is protected by Row-Level Security. We never log sensitive data like TFN, BSB or passwords.
faq.q14: How does the referral program work?
faq.a14: Share your unique referral code with friends. When they sign up using your code, both of you earn rewards. You also get 500 XP for each successful referral.
faq.q15: What is the difference between TFN and ABN mode?
faq.a15: TFN mode is designed for employees (Tax File Number) — it shows net salary after PAYG withholding, super contributions, and doesn't require invoices. ABN mode is for contractors with an Australian Business Number — it includes invoicing, contractor management, and GST tracking. MAX plan gives you both.
faq.a16: Ozly automatically calculates penalty rates based on the Cleaning Services Award (MA000022). Saturday shifts get 150%, Sundays 200%, and public holidays 250% of your base rate. It also knows all Australian public holidays by state for 2026.
faq.q17: Can I enter my salary as annual or fortnightly?
faq.a17: Yes! TFN users can enter their salary as Hourly, Annual, Monthly, or Fortnightly. Ozly automatically converts it to an hourly rate based on a standard 38-hour week and shows your estimated gross, PAYG and net take-home pay.
faq.a18: Quick Expense mode lets you log an expense with just the amount, category and date — no receipt photo needed. Smart mode uses AI OCR to read your receipt and extract all items automatically. You choose which mode suits each expense.
faq.q19: Can I bulk edit or delete multiple jobs?
faq.a19: Yes! Long-press any job to enter multi-select mode. You can then select multiple jobs and bulk edit the hourly rate or delete them all at once. Great for managing recurring shifts.
faq.a20: Ozly generates professional PDF timesheets from your completed jobs. You can filter by employer/contractor, and the timesheet includes dates, hours, rates, and totals. Share it directly via email or WhatsApp.
faq.a21: TFN and MAX users can log work-related expenses for reimbursement (fuel, laundry, tools, cleaning supplies, transport, uniform, phone, equipment). Use Smart Mode to scan a receipt with AI or Quick Mode to enter details manually. Select a period (weekly, fortnightly, monthly), choose a category, and save. You can then select multiple reimbursements, generate a professional PDF with your bank details, and send it to your employer via email or WhatsApp.
faq.q22: How do I export reimbursement PDFs?
faq.a22: Go to Reimbursements, tap the checklist icon to enter select mode, pick the items you want, and tap the PDF icon. Review your personal details, invoice number and bank info, then generate the PDF. You can send it via Email (with receipt photos attached), WhatsApp, or save it to your device. Items are automatically marked as 'emitted' after generating the PDF.
faq.q23: How does the referral program link work?
faq.a23: Each user gets a unique referral code. Share your personal link (ozly.au/refer/?code=YOUR_CODE) with friends. When they open it on their phone, the page automatically detects whether they're on iOS or Android and shows the right download button. They enter your code during signup, and you both earn rewards plus 500 XP.
faq.q24: Can I use Ozly without internet?
faq.a24: Yes! Ozly is offline-first. Your data is stored in an encrypted local database (SQLCipher). If you lose internet, the app loads your cached session and data so you can keep working. When you reconnect, everything syncs automatically with the cloud. You'll see an 'Offline mode' banner while disconnected.
faq.q25: Can I customise the email messages for invoices and reimbursements?
faq.a25: Yes! Go to Settings and find Message Templates. You can edit three templates: Invoice Send, Invoice Reminder, and Reimbursement. Each template supports placeholders like {name}, {number}, {amount} and {date} that are filled in automatically when you send. You can reset to defaults any time.
